evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: frame ambiguous problems into testable hypotheses; perform statistical analysis; assess data quality, bias, limitations; work within data governance, privacy frameworks
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Balance between analytical problem-solving (velocity) and rigorous statistical methodology, governance, and quality assessment (rigour).
evidence.domain_risk: public infrastructure programme (BusConnects); transportation/urban planning; moderate business impact
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Infrastructure programme affecting public sector without explicit financial reporting or regulatory compliance language.
evidence.collaboration_width: stakeholders; analysts; data professionals; domain experts
evidence.data_team_maturity: greenfield opportunity; team is still maturing; help shape processes; you will influence how analytics is done
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Explicit 'greenfield opportunity' with team still maturing signals early-stage data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: frame ambiguous business problems into structured data analysis questions; perform statistical analysis using regression, hypothesis testing; build reproducible analytical workflows; assess data quality, bias, limitations; work within data governance
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific analytical methodologies (regression, hypothesis testing, exploratory analysis) and governance/quality concerns demonstrate hiring manager ownership.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: BusConnects programme; transportation improvement; public impact
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Public sector infrastructure programme with stakeholder communication and decision-making support focus.
evidence.autonomy_level: help shape processes; influence how analytics is done; build reproducible workflows; collaborate with stakeholders
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role involves shaping analytical processes and methodology ('influence how analytics is done') while also collaborating within constraints (mixed).
evidence.ai_role: use AI tools to enhance data analysis, code generation, and insight discovery with careful validation; exposure to AI
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Explicit requirement for candidate to use AI tools to accelerate their analytical work, with emphasis on validation.
evidence.testing_framing: statistical analysis as testing; hypothesis testing; assess data quality
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Rigorous statistical testing and data quality assessment frame validation as core responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data quality, bias, limitations assessment; work within data governance, privacy, ethical frameworks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Emphasis on quality assessment and ethical frameworks suggests moderate risk concern.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: greenfield opportunity; help shape processes; team is still maturing
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Explicit greenfield framing for infrastructure analytics buildout.
evidence.loss_aversion: data quality, bias, limitations; data governance, privacy, ethical frameworks
